name: Fixture Control
comment: Follow-Me Fixture Control: Control fixture for managing Follow-Me functionality via a lighting console. Provides DMX-based access to Follow-Me parameters for patched fixtures, enabling remote configuration and control from the desk

gwSpecs.description: Control fixture for managing Follow-Me functionality via a lighting console. Provides DMX-based access to Follow-Me parameters for patched fixtures, enabling remote configuration and control from the desk
